headline: Net ROAS climbed from 62% → 95% (+33 pts, a 53% improvement) and NC Net ROAS from 49% → 72% (+23 pts) — shrinking net loss by 92% on 34% less spend.
physical_takeaways: 357 is the new flagship — $1.0M revenue (61% of physical) at 48.6% order-page CVR.
SF1 more than doubled in sales (944 → 2,023, +114%), revenue up +40% despite AOV dip ($376 → $246).
Revenue up +26% on essentially flat sales — higher-AOV funnels (357, SF1) now dominate.
Legacy funnels SQSE, SQP, THR, TOW effectively deprecated — combined <40 sales vs 3,700+ last year.
Concentration risk: 357 + SF1 = 91% of physical revenue. Fragile to a 357 slump.
digital_takeaways: Revenue up +12% on 18% fewer sales — AOV jumped +37% ($96 → $131). Digital is higher-ticket, lower-volume.
WPSS is a major new driver — $221K on 1,225 sales at $181 AOV. Didn't exist in the 2025 mix.
OSSF CVR surged 70.2% → 98.2% with fewer visitors — converting far more efficiently.
SRSW scaled from 15 → 669 sales (+4,360%). Small test last year, material contributor now.

tests_concluded.name: Hybrid Page VSL — Loud & In Your Face

themes.title: Friction reduction at checkout is the highest-leverage lever
themes.narrative: Hand & Pro Selection Redesign (EXP-0525) was the month's biggest win: +44.7% Funnel CVR, +31.5% Chk2 CVR, +35.9% revenue at 95% stat sig. Simplifying shaft selection compounded downstream.
themes.takeaway: Redesign selection/configuration steps elsewhere in the funnel.

themes.title: Trust signals at the decision moment convert
themes.narrative: Testimonials on CHK2 (EXP-0533) lifted Chk2 CVR +7.42% and Order CVR +2.3% (~$267K est. monthly revenue). Social proof immediately before "Complete My Order" moved the needle.
themes.takeaway: Replicate testimonial placement at other high-intent moments — shipping, upsells, post-ATC.

themes.title: Negative scarcity messaging backfires
themes.narrative: "Sold Out 10x / Back In Stock" callout (EXP-0526) drove a stat-sig −17% Chk2 CVR and −23% Funnel CVR. Highlighting past stock-outs introduced doubt rather than urgency.
themes.takeaway: Avoid OOS-framed scarcity. Test positive scarcity instead ("X sold this week," low-inventory).

themes.title: Engagement gains don't automatically translate to revenue
themes.narrative: Loud & In Your Face VSL (EXP-0535) lifted play rate +51%, 1:00 rate +764%, 4:00 rate +331% — but CVR was −3.7% and revenue −7.6%. More eyeballs ≠ more orders.
themes.takeaway: Optimize VSL for downstream conversion, not play-through metrics alone.

themes.title: Low-traffic pages need longer runways — or should be deprioritized
themes.narrative: Salespage LP vs PDP LP (EXP-0529) ended at only 25% stat sig after a month — not enough volume to learn from.
themes.takeaway: Gate tests on minimum traffic thresholds; revisit when traffic scales.

triumphs: Beginning to use AI for reporting.
Using Microsoft Clarity (User Behavior & Research Tool), includes Copilot AI.
Vanessa using CoC, WordPress, and GHL to bypass dev — re-creating pages and making live changes for implementations & split tests.
Future of testing tools with Convert & Intelligems.
challenges: Non-Member to Member Pricing halted testing.
Being able to easily exclude drop shippers from test data (SF1 + 357 impacted).
Greater alignment on funnel assessment after launch to determine V2.
Shopify & Paid pricing consistency and alignment.
